retrieved_result: What is Corrosion? Most people have seen the end results of corrosion on a number of appliances, vehicles, and other items that included metal components. But what is corrosion and how does it develop? Here are the basics of how corrosion begins and what can be done to prevent corrosion from ruining valuable items. Co
